title: Operations Manager — Payments
source: Dwelly EU Greenhouse via AI Operators newsletter (WebSearch discovery)
requirements_met: Fast-growing, operationally intensive environment: Ryan ex-Minima first employee
Strong Excel and BI skills: Ryan has data analytics background
Build/own operational processes: Ryan generalist ops experience
gaps: 5+ years payments or finance operations at scale: Ryan's ops is generalist, not payments-specialist
Direct line management of 20-30+ people across multiple sites: not in Ryan's background
Complex payment escalation handling: payments domain not held
preferred_met: RPA or low-code automation exposure: Ryan builds AI agents with Claude Code

industry_match.calculation: AI-enabled (AI used to run the business, not the product) = related industry (10)

notes: Dwelly is an AI-enabled lettings/property-management platform that acquires estate agencies and automates tenant management, payments and maintenance. Role is payments-ops-management specific (people leadership of 20-30+), a weaker fit for a generalist; included for coverage. Below 60 threshold.
